---
title: "IFNy_DEG_Analysis"
author: "Harsha Tamtam"
date: "2026-06-05"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#this chuck is to setup defaults for basic settings of the webpage, note that this chunk is R language and the chunk below is CSS language
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	dev = c("png","pdf")
)
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
pre {
  max-height: 400px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

pre[class] {
  max-height: 200px;
}
```

## Library Section
```{r Libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(scales)
library(edgeR)
library(smplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(workflowr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggrepel)
```

Reading in files:
```{r}
metadata <- readRDS("data/metadata_IFNy.RDS")
counts <- readRDS("data/counts_IFNy.RDS")

raw_counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(Entrez_ID, Symbol)) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Ensemble, names_to = "Samples", values_to = "raw_counts") %>% 
  mutate(raw_counts = as.numeric(raw_counts)) %>% 
  left_join(metadata, by = c("Samples" = "SampleName")) %>% 
  select(Ensemble, raw_counts, Condition) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = Condition, values_from = raw_counts) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensemble")


```

Converting to Log2 CPM (in case this is needed):
```{r}
raw_log2cpm <- cpm(raw_counts, log = TRUE)
filtered_raw_counts <- raw_counts[rowMeans(raw_log2cpm)> 0,]

dim(filtered_raw_counts)
str(filtered_raw_counts)
```
Selecting only for Chimps:
```{r}
# chimp_meta <- metadata %>% 
#   filter(
#     Species == "C"
#     )
# 
# 
# chimp_counts <- raw_counts %>%
#   dplyr::select(Ensemble,
#     all_of(chimp_meta$Condition)
#   )

```

```{r}

dge <- DGEList(
  counts = filtered_raw_counts,
  group = metadata$Cond
  )

dge <- calcNormFactors(dge,
                       method = "TMM"
                       )
metadata$Cond2 <- metadata$Cond
metadata$Cond2 <- gsub("_R$", "", metadata$Cond2)

design <- model.matrix(~0 + Cond2, data = metadata)
colnames(design) <- gsub("^Cond2", "", colnames(design))

cor_fit <- duplicateCorrelation(object = dge$counts,
                                design = design,
                                block = metadata$Individual
                                )

voom_trend <- voom(dge,
                   design,
                   block = metadata$Individual, 
                   correlation = cor_fit$consensus.correlation,
                   plot = TRUE)
```

```{r Chunk of code observing number of DEGs across treatment}
fit <- lmFit(voom_trend, design, block = metadata$Individual,
             correlation = cor_fit$consensus.correlation)

#colnames(fit$coefficients)
contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(
  V.Treatment_H = H_IFNy - H_VEH,
  V.Treatment_C = C_IFNy - C_VEH,
  V.Species_IFNy = H_IFNy - C_IFNy,
  V.Species_VEH = H_VEH - C_VEH,
  levels = design
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
efit2 <- eBayes(fit2)
signif_gene_results = decideTests(efit2, adjust.method = "BH", p.value = 0.05)

summary(signif_gene_results)
plotSA(efit2, main = "Mean-variance final model trend")

```


```{r Volcano Plots comparing treatment conditions within the same species using limma, eval=FALSE, fig.height=4, fig.width=6, include=FALSE}

Human_IFNy_vs_VEH <- topTable(efit2, coef = "V.Treatment_H", adjust.method = "BH", p.value = 1, number = Inf)
Chimp_IFNy_vs_VEH <- topTable(efit2, coef = "V.Treatment_C", adjust.method = "BH", p.value = 1, number = Inf)
IFNy_Human_vs_Chimp <- topTable(efit2, coef = "V.Species_IFNy", adjust.method = "BH", p.value = 1, number = Inf)
VEH_Human_vs_Chimp <- topTable(efit2, coef = "V.Species_VEH", adjust.method = "BH", p.value = 1, number = Inf)

toptable_list <- list(Human_IFNy_vs_VEH, Chimp_IFNy_vs_VEH, IFNy_Human_vs_Chimp, VEH_Human_vs_Chimp)
comparison_name_list <- list("Human: IFNy vs VEH", "Chimp: IFNy vs VEH", "IFNy: Human vs Chimp", "VEH: Human vs Chimp")

generate_volcano_plot <- function(toptable, comparison_name) {

  volcano_colors <- toptable %>%
    rownames_to_column("Genes") %>%
    left_join(counts %>% 
                select (Ensemble, Symbol),
              by = c("Genes" = "Ensemble")) %>% 
    mutate(
    id_label = ifelse(
      is.na(Symbol),
      Genes,
      Symbol
    )
  ) %>% 
    mutate(
      neglog10AdjP = -log10(pmax(adj.P.Val, 1e-300)),
      color_key = case_when(
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC > 0  ~ "Up",
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )

  top_10_genes <- volcano_colors %>%
  arrange(adj.P.Val) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
  
  gene_of_interest <- volcano_colors %>% 
    dplyr::filter(id_label == "EOMES")

  p <- ggplot(
    volcano_colors,
    aes(x = logFC, y = neglog10AdjP)
    ) +
    geom_point(
      aes(color = color_key),
      size = 2,
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    
    scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(-12, 12),
    breaks = seq(-12, 12, by = 6)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 18),
    breaks = seq(0, 18, by = 6)
    ) +
    
    # geom_vline(
    # xintercept = c(-1,1),
    # linetype = "dashed"
    # ) +
    # geom_hline(
    # yintercept = -log10(0.05),
    # linetype = "dashed"
    # ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      # data = top_10_genes,
      data = gene_of_interest,
      aes(label = id_label),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.5
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up" = "red",
        "Down" = "blue",
        "NS" = "grey50"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = comparison_name,
      x = "log2FC",
      y = "-log10(Adj.P-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.6),
      text = element_text(size = 12)
    ) 
  
    list(
      plot = p,
      #top10 = top_10_genes,
      interesting_gene = gene_of_interest
      )
}
for (i in seq_along(toptable_list)) {
  # Generate and display the results
  results <- generate_volcano_plot(
    toptable_list[[i]],
    comparison_name_list[[i]]
  )
  #print(results$top10)
  print(results$interesting_gene)
  print(results$plot) # Print the plot to view
}
```
